conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times.
new_constraint: Do not use the keyword "upcoming" in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times. Do not use the keyword "upcoming" in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Gallery Showings

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of the work featured at your gallery and am very interested in seeing what you have planned for the near future. Could you please provide me with information regarding your scheduled shows? I am particularly keen to learn more about your **upcoming exhibitions**.

If there is a digital calendar or a dedicated page on your website detailing the shows on the horizon, I would be grateful if you could direct me to it. Otherwise, I would appreciate it if you could share details about your **upcoming exhibitions** via reply.

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing about your **upcoming exhibitions** and visiting the gallery soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]<turn|>
